thinks.think: A top-down shot shows the stainless steel inner pot of an Instant Pot sitting on a wooden surface. White text overlay reads "- Set the Instant Pot to Sauté". To the left, part of the pressure cooker lid is visible. Towards the end of the clip, a finger briefly appears at the bottom edge, pressing a button on the control panel.

The camera zooms in on the stainless steel control panel. A finger presses the button labeled Sauté at the bottom left. A red indicator light illuminates next to the Sauté label, signaling activation. The white instructional text remains at the top of the frame throughout the shot.

The camera angle shifts back to a top-down view of the empty inner pot. The on-screen text updates to "- 1lb lean ground beef (or Italian sausage)". A hand wearing a light grey long sleeve enters the frame, holding a package of raw meat wrapped in plastic over the pot.

The hand tilts the plastic package over the pot. In the final frame, the raw red block of ground beef sits at the bottom of the stainless steel pot, removed from its wrapper. The white text overlay identifying the ingredient remains at the top of the screen.

The raw block of ground beef remains stationary at the bottom of the stainless steel pot. The white text overlay identifying the ingredient persists at the top. A wooden spoon enters from the top right corner, angling down towards the meat, suggesting an imminent stirring or breaking action.

A hand wearing a light grey sleeve uses a wooden spoon to break the block of raw ground beef into smaller crumbles inside the pot. The meat transitions from a solid block to loose pieces. The spoon rests on the broken meat.

A hand wearing a light grey sleeve uses a wooden spoon to vigorously break up and stir the ground beef inside the pot. The meat transforms from a solid block into loose, browned crumbles distributed across the bottom of the stainless steel container.

The ground beef appears fully browned and crumbled. A hand holds a wooden spoon while another hand brings a small glass bowl with light powder into the upper right. White text lists seasonings: 1 teaspoon salt, 1 teaspoon garlic powder, 1/2 teaspoon onion powder, and 2 teaspoons Italian seasoning.

A hand tilts a small glass bowl, sprinkling yellow powder onto the browned ground beef. Distinct piles of yellow and green spices are now visible on the meat's surface near the wooden spoon. The instructional text listing specific seasoning measurements remains static at the top of the frame.

The hand holding the glass bowl exits, leaving distinct piles of yellow and green seasonings resting on the browned ground beef. The wooden spoon remains stationary inside the stainless steel pot. The white text listing salt, garlic powder, onion powder, and Italian seasoning stays visible at the top.

A hand grasps the wooden spoon resting in the pot and begins stirring the browned ground beef. The motion mixes the previously distinct piles of yellow and green seasonings into the meat, blending the spices throughout the crumbles while the ingredient text remains visible above.

The wooden spoon rests diagonally on the seasoned, browned ground beef within the stainless steel pot. The white instructional text overlay listing ingredients vanishes from the top. At the bottom edge, fingers touch the dark base of the Instant Pot appliance.

White text overlay reading "- Turn the Instant Pot off & drain excess grease" appears at the top of the frame. A hand enters from the right side, reaching towards and grasping the handle of the wooden spoon that is resting on the browned ground beef inside the stainless steel inner pot.

A hand in a light grey sleeve uses a wooden spoon to push the browned ground beef to the side of the stainless steel pot. This action reveals a pool of clear, yellowish liquid grease accumulating at the bottom center, while the white text instruction to drain excess grease remains visible at the top of the frame.

A hand in a grey sleeve holds a wooden spoon over browned meat pushed to the pot's edges. Another hand enters from the right holding a white paper towel near the exposed pool of yellow grease. The instructional text regarding draining grease remains visible at the top.

A hand uses a white paper towel to wipe the bottom of the pot, absorbing the visible yellow grease. The wooden spoon pushes the browned ground beef to the side to allow access. The white text overlay regarding draining grease is no longer visible on the screen.

A hand holds a blue box of Great Value Spaghetti pasta horizontally above the Instant Pot containing browned ground beef. A white text overlay appears at the top reading '- Add 16oz of regular spaghetti pasta'. The previous grease and paper towel are gone from the pot.

A hand places a bundle of long, yellow, uncooked spaghetti noodles into the Instant Pot on top of the browned ground beef. A plate with additional pasta is visible in the bottom right corner. The text overlay "- Add 16oz of regular spaghetti pasta" remains at the top.

A hand in a grey sleeve snaps a bundle of long, yellow spaghetti noodles in half over the browned ground beef within the pot. The white text overlay updates to "- Break the spaghetti in half" as the broken pasta strands are arranged in layers across the surface of the meat.

A hand wearing a grey sleeve breaks bundles of long, yellow spaghetti noodles in half, layering the strands over the browned ground beef inside the pot. The white text instruction "- Break the spaghetti in half" remains at the top of the frame. A plate containing more uncooked pasta is visible in the bottom right corner.

The text overlay changes to "- Crisscross the pasta to minimize clumping". The broken yellow spaghetti strands are now arranged in a crisscross pattern over the browned ground beef inside the stainless steel pot. A hand reaches toward a plate of pasta in the bottom right corner.

The text "- Crisscross the pasta to minimize clumping" remains visible at the top. A hand reaches into the bottom right corner, grasping a bundle of uncooked yellow spaghetti strands from a blue and white patterned plate and lifting them slightly.

A hand wearing a grey sleeve places a bundle of yellow spaghetti strands into the pot, adding to the crisscrossed layer over the browned meat. The text "- Crisscross the pasta to minimize clumping" stays at the top. The plate with remaining pasta is visible in the bottom right corner.

The pot is filled with a thick layer of crisscrossed yellow spaghetti strands covering the browned meat. The white instructional text overlay disappears from the top of the screen. A hand holding a jar of red pasta sauce enters the frame from the right side, showing a partial white label.

White text reading "- Add 24oz of spaghetti sauce" appears at the top. A hand holds a glass jar of red pasta sauce on the right edge, preparing to pour it into the pot which contains crisscrossed yellow spaghetti strands layered over browned ground beef.

The white instructional text updates to "- Add 36 fluid ounces of water" at the top. A large, thick pool of red spaghetti sauce now covers the center of the crisscrossed yellow pasta. A hand holds a glass jar containing reddish liquid over the pot's right edge, poised to pour.

A hand tilts a glass jar to pour liquid into the pot over the red sauce and yellow spaghetti strands. The white text overlay '- Add 36 fluid ounces of water' remains at the top. The liquid flows onto the center pile of sauce, mixing slightly as it enters the stainless steel pot.

A hand finishes pouring liquid from a glass jar into the stainless steel pot, which contains crisscrossed yellow spaghetti strands, browned ground beef, and a large mound of red sauce. The text overlay '- Add 36 fluid ounces of water' remains visible at the top as the jar is lifted away.

A hand tilts a glass jar to pour liquid into the stainless steel pot containing pasta and sauce. The fluid flows over the red sauce mound and yellow spaghetti strands, raising the liquid level. The white text overlay '- Add 36 fluid ounces of water' remains visible at the top.

A hand tilts a metal can to pour chunky red diced tomatoes into the pot over the spaghetti and sauce mixture. The white text overlay at the top updates to read "- Add 14.5oz of diced tomatoes (or tomato sauce)" as the tomatoes fall onto the existing ingredients.

A hand wearing a light grey sleeve tilts a metal can with a blue and white label, pouring chunky red diced tomatoes onto the spaghetti and sauce mixture inside the stainless steel pot. The white text overlay '- Add 14.5oz of diced tomatoes (or tomato sauce)' remains visible at the top as the hand maneuvers the can to empty the remaining contents into the pot.

A hand holding a metal can finishes pouring chunky red diced tomatoes onto the red sauce and yellow spaghetti strands within the stainless steel pot. The white text overlay '- Add 14.5oz of diced tomatoes (or tomato sauce)' stays fixed at the top while the tomatoes pile up on the existing ingredients.

The hand holding the metal can exits the frame after emptying the contents. The white instructional text overlay disappears from the top. A wooden spoon enters from the upper right, positioning itself over the mound of diced tomatoes and red sauce in the center of the stainless steel pot.

A hand uses a wooden spoon to stir the contents of the stainless steel pot, mixing the yellow spaghetti strands with the red sauce and chunky diced tomatoes. The spoon pushes through the center, beginning to blend the distinct layers of ingredients together.

A hand uses a wooden spoon to stir the mixture inside the stainless steel pot. The yellow spaghetti strands, red sauce, and chunky diced tomatoes are being blended together. The spoon pushes through the center, distributing the red liquid more evenly over the pasta layers as the ingredients combine.

A hand wearing a grey sleeve rotates the black vent knob on the lid of the stainless steel pot. White text overlay reads '- Set the vent knob to the 'Sealing Position''. The hand adjusts the knob to the correct setting and then moves away, leaving the lid secured on the cooker.

A hand wearing a light grey sleeve finishes adjusting the black vent knob on the lid to the sealing position. The hand moves away, leaving the stainless steel pot closed. The white text overlay instructing to set the vent knob remains visible at the top of the frame.

The text overlay updates to '- Manually cook on 'High Pressure' for 8 minutes'. The view shifts from the lid to the front control panel. A finger presses the 'Manual' button while the red LED display reads 'OFF'.

A close-up shows the stainless steel control panel with red LED digits reading '00:10'. A finger presses the minus button below the display, changing the time to '00:08'. The text overlay remains visible at the top, instructing to manually cook on high pressure for 8 minutes.

A finger presses the minus button on the stainless steel control panel, changing the red LED display from 10 to 8 minutes. The 'High Pressure' indicator light is illuminated below the screen, aligning with the white text overlay instructing to manually cook on high pressure for 8 minutes.

The camera angle shifts from the control panel back to a top-down view of the lid. The text overlay changes to instruct a quick pressure release. A hand holding a wooden spoon reaches toward the black vent knob on the stainless steel cooker to safely turn it.

A hand wearing a light grey sleeve grips the black handle on the lid of the stainless steel cooker. The hand twists the lid counter-clockwise to unlock it, following the pressure release. The silver locking pin is visible as the lid begins to rotate. The text overlay is no longer present.

A hand in a grey sleeve lifts the black lid completely away from the stainless steel pot, revealing the cooked spaghetti and red sauce mixture inside. The underside of the lid, showing condensation, is held to the left, fully exposing the steaming food within the inner pot.

The black lid is lifted away to the left, exposing cooked spaghetti in red sauce within the stainless steel pot. A hand uses a wooden spoon to stir the contents from the upper right while white text overlay instructs to '- Stir the spaghetti really well to incorporate liquid'.

A hand uses a wooden spoon to stir the cooked spaghetti and red sauce mixture inside the stainless steel pot. The spoon lifts and turns the yellow noodles, blending them with the red liquid and tomato chunks. The white text overlay instructing to stir remains visible at the top of the frame throughout the action.

A hand continues using a wooden spoon to stir the spaghetti and red sauce inside the stainless steel pot. The noodles are lifted and turned to mix thoroughly with the liquid. The white instructional text overlay remains visible at the top of the frame throughout the stirring action.

The text overlay updates to '- Give it a few minutes to thicken'. A hand holding a white cloth grips the left handle of the pot. The wooden spoon rests against the right side of the pot, no longer stirring the saucy spaghetti mixture.

The white instructional text overlay vanishes from the top. The hand gripping the left handle with a white cloth is no longer visible. The wooden spoon, previously resting in the stainless steel pot, is actively stirred by a hand to mix the saucy spaghetti noodles.

A hand uses a wooden spoon to vigorously stir the spaghetti and red sauce mixture inside the stainless steel pot. The spoon lifts strands of pasta, showing the sauce is well-incorporated. The silver lid sits on the table to the left. No text is visible on screen.

A hand lifts a wooden spoon high, raising a large portion of spaghetti coated in red sauce out of the stainless steel pot. The silver lid remains on the wooden surface to the left, and the pasta strands drape from the spoon, showcasing the mixed dish.

The hand stirs vigorously, transforming the beef from a raw block into loose, browned crumbles distributed across the bottom of the pot.

[18-20] Distinct piles of yellow and green seasonings sit atop browned ground beef in a stainless steel pot, beneath white text listing "- 1 teaspoon salt", "- 1 teaspoon garlic powder", "- 1/2 teaspoon onion powder", and "- 2 teaspoons Italian seasoning". [20-22] A hand stirs the mixture with a wooden spoon, blending the spices into the meat. [22-24] The text overlay disappears while the spoon rests on the seasoned beef. [24-26] New text appears reading "- Turn the Instant Pot off & drain excess grease" as a hand grabs the spoon handle. [26-28] The hand pushes the meat to the side, exposing a pool of clear, yellowish grease at the bottom.

[28-32] A hand in a grey sleeve uses a wooden spoon to push browned ground beef to the pot's edges, exposing a pool of yellow grease. Another hand uses a white paper towel to wipe the bottom, absorbing the grease. The instructional text regarding draining grease disappears. [32-36] A hand holds a blue box of Great Value Spaghetti horizontally above the pot. The text '- Add 16oz of regular spaghetti pasta' appears. The hand places a bundle of long, yellow uncooked spaghetti noodles into the pot on top of the beef. [36-38] The hand breaks the spaghetti bundle in half over the meat. The text overlay updates to '- Break the spaghetti in half'. The broken yellow strands are arranged in layers across the surface.

[38-40] A hand wearing a grey sleeve breaks bundles of long, yellow spaghetti noodles in half, layering the strands over browned ground beef inside a stainless steel pot, guided by the text "- Break the spaghetti in half". A plate with more pasta is visible in the bottom right. [40-46] The text overlay changes to "- Crisscross the pasta to minimize clumping". The broken yellow spaghetti strands are arranged in a crisscross pattern over the meat. The hand reaches into the bottom right corner, grasping bundles of uncooked yellow spaghetti from a blue and white patterned plate and placing them into the pot to continue the crisscross layering.

[16-18] A hand tilts a small glass bowl, sprinkling yellow powder onto browned ground beef where distinct piles of yellow and green spices are visible near a wooden spoon. [46-48] The pot contains a thick layer of crisscrossed yellow spaghetti strands covering the browned meat; text disappears and a hand holding a red pasta sauce jar enters from the right. [48-50] White text '- Add 24oz of spaghetti sauce' appears as the hand prepares to pour. [50-52] The text updates to '- Add 36 fluid ounces of water' while a thick pool of red sauce covers the pasta center. [52-56] The hand pours liquid from the glass jar over the sauce and spaghetti, mixing slightly as it enters the stainless steel pot, then lifts the jar away.

[56-58] A hand tilts a glass jar to pour liquid into a stainless steel pot containing yellow spaghetti and a mound of red sauce, raising the liquid level while the text '- Add 36 fluid ounces of water' remains visible. [58-64] A hand wearing a light grey sleeve tilts a metal can with a blue and white label to pour chunky red diced tomatoes onto the pasta and sauce mixture, as the overlay changes to '- Add 14.5oz of diced tomatoes (or tomato sauce)'. [64-68] Once the can is empty and the text vanishes, a wooden spoon enters from the upper right to stir the contents, pushing through the center to blend the distinct layers of spaghetti, sauce, and tomatoes.

[68-70] A hand uses a wooden spoon to stir yellow spaghetti, red sauce, and chunky diced tomatoes inside a stainless steel pot, pushing through the center to distribute liquid. [70-74] A hand wearing a grey sleeve rotates the black vent knob on the lid to the 'Sealing Position' as instructed by the overlay '- Set the vent knob to the 'Sealing Position'', then moves away. [74-80] The overlay updates to '- Manually cook on 'High Pressure' for 8 minutes'. A finger presses the 'Manual' button while the display reads 'OFF', then presses the minus button to change the red LED digits from '00:10' to '00:08', illuminating the 'High Pressure' indicator. [80-82] The camera shifts to the lid with overlay '- Safely do a 'Quick Pressure Release''. A hand holding a wooden spoon reaches toward the black vent knob to safely turn it.

[82-86] A hand wearing a light grey sleeve grips the black handle on the lid of the stainless steel cooker, twisting it counter-clockwise to unlock the silver locking pin before lifting the black lid away to the left, revealing steaming spaghetti and red sauce inside the inner pot.
[86-92] With the lid removed, a hand uses a wooden spoon to stir the cooked spaghetti and red sauce mixture thoroughly inside the stainless steel pot, following the on-screen instruction "- Stir the spaghetti really well to incorporate liquid" to blend the yellow noodles with the red liquid and tomato chunks.
[92-94] The text overlay updates to "- Give it a few minutes to thicken" as the stirring stops; a hand holding a white cloth grips the left handle of the pot while the wooden spoon rests against the right side of the saucy spaghetti mixture.

[4-8] The view returns to top-down as text updates to "- 1lb lean ground beef (or Italian sausage)". A hand in a light grey sleeve empties a raw red block of ground beef from a plastic package into the pot. [8-14] A wooden spoon breaks the solid block of meat. The hand stirs vigorously, transforming the beef from a raw block into loose, browned crumbles distributed across the bottom of the pot. [18-20] Distinct piles of yellow and green seasonings sit atop browned ground beef in a stainless steel pot, beneath white text listing "- 1 teaspoon salt", "- 1 teaspoon garlic powder", "- 1/2 teaspoon onion powder", and "- 2 teaspoons Italian seasoning". [20-22] A hand stirs the mixture with a wooden spoon, blending the spices into the meat. [22-24] The text overlay disappears while the spoon rests on the seasoned beef. [24-26]

[38-40] A hand wearing a grey sleeve breaks bundles of long, yellow spaghetti noodles in half, layering the strands over browned ground beef inside a stainless steel pot, guided by the text "- Break the spaghetti in half". A plate with more pasta is visible in the bottom right. [40-46] The text overlay changes to "- Crisscross the pasta to minimize clumping". The broken yellow spaghetti strands are arranged in a crisscross pattern over the meat. The hand reaches into the bottom right corner, grasping bundles of uncooked yellow spaghetti from a blue and white patterned plate and placing them into the pot to continue the crisscross layering.

[16-18] A hand tilts a small glass bowl, sprinkling yellow powder onto browned ground beef where distinct piles of yellow and green spices are visible near a wooden spoon. [46-48] The pot contains a thick layer of crisscrossed yellow spaghetti strands covering the browned meat; text disappears and a hand holding a red pasta sauce jar enters from the right. [48-50] White text '- Add 24oz of spaghetti sauce' appears as the hand prepares to pour. [50-52] The text updates to '- Add 36 fluid ounces of water' while a thick pool of red sauce covers the pasta center. [52-56] The hand pours liquid from the glass jar over the sauce and spaghetti, mixing slightly as it enters the stainless steel pot, then lifts the jar away.

[56-58] A hand tilts a glass jar to pour liquid into a stainless steel pot containing yellow spaghetti and a mound of red sauce, raising the liquid level while the text '- Add 36 fluid ounces of water' remains visible. [58-64] A hand wearing a light grey sleeve tilts a metal can with a blue and white label to pour chunky red diced tomatoes onto the pasta and sauce mixture, as the overlay changes to '- Add 14.5oz of diced tomatoes (or tomato sauce)'. [64-68] Once the can is empty and the text vanishes, a wooden spoon enters from the upper right to stir the contents, pushing through the center to blend the distinct layers of spaghetti, sauce, and tomatoes.

[68-70] A hand uses a wooden spoon to stir yellow spaghetti, red sauce, and chunky diced tomatoes inside a stainless steel pot, pushing through the center to distribute liquid. [70-74] A hand wearing a grey sleeve rotates the black vent knob on the lid to the 'Sealing Position' as instructed by the overlay '- Set the vent knob to the 'Sealing Position'', then moves away. [74-80] The overlay updates to '- Manually cook on 'High Pressure' for 8 minutes'. A finger presses the 'Manual' button while the display reads 'OFF', then presses the minus button to change the red LED digits from '00:10' to '00:08', illuminating the 'High Pressure' indicator. [80-82] The camera shifts to the lid with overlay '- Safely do a 'Quick Pressure Release''. A hand holding a wooden spoon reaches toward the black vent knob to safely turn it.

recent_thinks.text: The ground beef appears fully browned and crumbled. A hand holds a wooden spoon while another hand brings a small glass bowl with light powder into the upper right. White text lists seasonings: 1 teaspoon salt, 1 teaspoon garlic powder, 1/2 teaspoon onion powder, and 2 teaspoons Italian seasoning.

A hand wearing a light grey sleeve grips the black handle on the lid of the stainless steel cooker. The hand twists the lid counter-clockwise to unlock it, following the pressure release. The silver locking pin is visible as the lid begins to rotate. The text overlay is no longer present.

A hand in a grey sleeve lifts the black lid completely away from the stainless steel pot, revealing the cooked spaghetti and red sauce mixture inside. The underside of the lid, showing condensation, is held to the left, fully exposing the steaming food within the inner pot.

The black lid is lifted away to the left, exposing cooked spaghetti in red sauce within the stainless steel pot. A hand uses a wooden spoon to stir the contents from the upper right while white text overlay instructs to '- Stir the spaghetti really well to incorporate liquid'.

A hand uses a wooden spoon to stir the cooked spaghetti and red sauce mixture inside the stainless steel pot. The spoon lifts and turns the yellow noodles, blending them with the red liquid and tomato chunks. The white text overlay instructing to stir remains visible at the top of the frame throughout the action.
